metadata.description: Harvests high-signal prospects from multiple sources

config.instructions: Execute Stage 1: FIND & VET. Scrape Instagram and Reddit for micro-creators in the 10k-100k range with business emails in bio. Filter by ER > 3%.

metadata.description: Builds Creator DNA and calculates profit potential

config.instructions: Execute Stage 2: ASSIMILATION. Build Personality, Audience, and Product DNA profiles. Calculate the 1% Factual Rule potential for each qualified lead.
Execute Stages 3-5: APPROACH & DELIVERY. Generate the 6-Section HTML Monetization Gameplan using the template in 'assets/'. Deliver the asset from 'intellimira@gmail.com' via the GAS Bridge.

metadata.description: Consolidates and archives all project solutions

config.instructions: Consolidate all generated assets (Gameplans, Audits, CRM logs) into '.brain/outputs/shadow_ops_proof/'. Ensure the solution is 'available within the folders' for easy retrieval and audit.

metadata.description: Final quality gate and lineage logger

config.instructions: Log final lineage and DM scores to '.mira/scores/shadow_ops_proof_lineage.json'. Validate the 'Proof of Work' against the £300 target.
